login.console_placeholder: Connection and SSH messages will appear here...
login.command_placeholder: Type a command and press Enter/Run
login.x11_autodeps_tip: On Connect, plink.exe and VcXsrv are checked. If missing, they will be downloaded (with your consent) and started.
login.close_vcxsrv_tip: If VcXsrv was started by TrubaGUI, it will be closed by PID.
login.close_x11_procs_tip: plink/ssh QProcess instances started by TrubaGUI will be terminated.
login.err_master_wrong: Master password is wrong or the saved password could not be decrypted.
login.err_host_required: Host / IP is required. Username and password are optional.
login.err_x11_plink_needed: plink.exe is required for X11 but could not be prepared.
login.err_x11_vcxsrv_failed: VcXsrv could not be started for X11 (firewall/permissions may be blocking).
login.x11_autodeps_label: When X11 is enabled, check/download/start required tools
login.close_vcxsrv_label: Close VcXsrv when the app exits
login.reconnect_prompt_message: The SSH session ended unexpectedly. Do you want to reconnect?
login.reconnect_notice:
SSH connection dropped: {reason}
Press r or choose Yes to reconnect.
login.reconnect_placeholder: Disconnected: type r and press Enter to reconnect

settings.jobs_outputs_refresh_interval_tip: Live polling interval for Jobs & Outputs; manual refresh stays separate.

Close the application and install it now?

files.title: Outputs

editor.title: Editor
editor.lint_need_path: Please provide a target path first.
editor.lint_ok: Lint passed. No obvious issues found.
editor.submit_hint_account: Invalid account/partition combination. Verify #SBATCH -A and -p values.
editor.submit_hint_qos: QOS is invalid for this account. Try another QOS/partition.
editor.submit_hint_time: Requested time is above policy limits. Lower --time or change QOS.
editor.submit_hint_cpu: CPU request exceeds allowed limit. Reduce -c/-n or ask for higher limits.
editor.submit_hint_gpu: GPU request may be invalid for selected partition. Check --gres and partition.
editor.validation_missing_time: - Time limit is not set (#SBATCH --time or -t)
editor.validation_missing_output: - Output file is not set (#SBATCH --output or -o)

dirs.invalid_new_name: The name cannot be empty or contain / or \ characters.
dirs.new_item_exists:
A file or folder with this name already exists:
{path}
dirs.new_slurm_exists: File already exists. Overwrite in editor?
dirs.submit_failed:
sbatch submission failed: {err}
Check the connection and Slurm script directives.
dirs.submit_failed_no_job_id: Submission returned no valid job ID. Check the script and Slurm response.
dirs.rename_single_required: Select exactly one item to rename.
dirs.permissions_intro: Please select the new attributes for the selected item "{name}".
dirs.permissions_help: You can enter a textual mode change (chmod), or the new mode bits in octal.
dirs.permissions_recurse_all: Apply to all files and directories
dirs.permissions_invalid: Enter a valid octal mode such as 755 or 0644.

jobs_outputs.open_out2_new_window: Follow in Output 2 in new window

jobs_outputs.open_out2_new_tab: Follow in Output 2 in new tab

jobs_outputs.waiting_for_file_unknown: The {kind} file does not exist yet ({error}). It will be retried on every refresh.

putty.needed_msg:
For X11 forwarding on Windows, 'plink.exe' is required.

Reason: password-based X11 sessions (OpenSSH GUI/TTY limitation)

File to download: plink.exe
Source: {url}

Download now?

xserver.need_confirm_log: VcXsrv missing. User confirmation is required for download.
xserver.start_closed: X11: VcXsrv started but exited immediately.
xserver.port_not_open: X11: VcXsrv seems running but 127.0.0.1:6000 did not open.
xserver.lock_timeout: X11: VcXsrv start lock timeout (another instance may exist).

settings.jobs_outputs_refresh_interval_tip: Live polling interval for Jobs & Outputs; manual refresh stays separate.
settings.lssrv_auto_refresh_tip: When enabled, lssrv refreshes at the Jobs & Outputs interval while connected.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_label: After sbatch submission, show output/error in
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_tip: Controls where parsed Slurm output and error files are followed after a successful sbatch submission.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_none_tip: Register and refresh the submitted job, but keep the current main tab and output view unchanged.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_outputs_tab_tip: Open the Jobs & Outputs page and continue output and error in its existing Output 1 and Output 2 panels.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_tabs_tip: Open one new lower tab that follows the submitted job's output and error together.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_window_combined_tip: Open one independent window with output and error together.
settings.sbatch_follow_mode_windows_split_tip: Open separate independent windows for the output and error files.
settings.transfer_parallelism_tip: Applies to parallel uploads and downloads that use isolated SFTP channels. Other file operations remain sequential.
settings.completion_action_unsupported: This completion action was saved but needs confirmation and is not executed.
settings.x11_autodeps_label: When X11 is enabled, check/download/start required tools
settings.x11_autodeps_tip: On Connect, plink.exe and VcXsrv are checked. If missing, they will be downloaded (with your consent) and started.
settings.close_vcxsrv_label: Close VcXsrv when the app exits
settings.close_vcxsrv_tip: If VcXsrv was started by TrubaGUI, it will be closed by PID.
settings.close_x11_procs_tip: plink/ssh QProcess instances started by TrubaGUI will be terminated.
settings.ftp_transfer_type_tip: Auto uses ASCII only for known text files and Binary for all ambiguous or binary files.

ftp.no_remote_selection: Select at least one remote file or folder.

ftp.invalid_drop: The dropped remote selection does not belong to this FTP workspace.

ftp.set_home_default: Set current folder as default Home

transfer.unavailable_export: Export is not available in this version.

transfer.conflict_intro: The target file already exists. Please choose an action.
transfer.conflict_overwrite_if_size_differs_or_ne: Overwrite if different size or source newer

connection.password_edit_only: Do not ask when connecting; verify only when this connection is edited
connection.password_edit_only_tip: The password is protected for your Windows account. It is not requested for normal connections; editing the profile requires verification.
connection.edit_auth_prompt: Enter the saved SSH password to edit this connection:
connection.edit_auth_failed: Password verification failed. The connection was not edited.
connection.saved_password_unavailable: The saved password could not be decrypted for this Windows user account.
connection.password_store_failed: The password could not be protected for your Windows account: {error}

tour.s1_body: Enter host, port, and username here. Save a profile for repeated use.
tour.s2_body: Enable this only for GUI apps (MATLAB, ParaView, etc.).
tour.s3_body: Run remote shell commands from this input.
tour.s4_body: Refresh queue state, manage jobs, and inspect output/error files.
tour.s5_body: Use scratch/home panels for upload, download, move, and conflict-safe operations.
tour.s6_body: Use logs and diagnostics export for troubleshooting and support.
